goal: Produce complete lesson plans, student-facing materials, and assessments for Week 6 of Algebra I Section ALG-01 (Sep 23-27, 2026). Plans must align with pacing calendar, unit scope, and curriculum standards.

context.note: Week 6 is focused on review, problem-solving, and preparation for the unit 1 assessment

dependencies.standards_reference: NY State Math Standards Grade 8-9, Linear Equations

outputs_needed: 5 daily lesson plans (one per instructional day)
Warm-up and exit ticket for each day
A summary of the week's learning objectives
Unit 1 assessment (if new; otherwise refer to existing)

constraints.alignment_required: NY State Standards for 8-9 grade algebra
